title: Lead Investment Banker at Cholamandalam Finance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Cholamandalam Finance
jsonLd.description:
Cholamandalam Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cholamandalam Finance:
Cholamandalam Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cholamandalam Finance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
